title: Live updates: More bitcoin is now held at a loss than at a profit
Binance says MiCA should be judged by who it licenses, not who it excludes
summary: Europe head Gillian Lynch said Binance met Greece's licensing requirements and that the company remains committed to the EU, despite withdrawing its MiCA application days before the July 1 deadline.

title: Finally. $221 million flow into Bitcoin ETFs, ending a painful 10-day outflow streak
summary: Spot ETFs had their strongest inflow day in two months, driven by funds other than BlackRock’s IBIT.

title: XRP bulls test path back toward $1.10 as token zips 4% higher
summary: Buyers defended a higher low and pushed XRP toward near-term resistance, though the move still needs a clean break above $1.10 to confirm momentum.

title: Ether and solana extend gains as a short squeeze lifts bitcoin toward $62,000
summary: Bearish traders lost $281 million in liquidations over 24 hours, nearly double the longs, as bitcoin pushed to its strongest level in two weeks. Ether is up almost 10% on the week and solana nearly 19% while a rebound in tech stocks eased the pressure from the AI trade.
